summary: Frontend-only i18n verification for Gastromek CRM (DE default + TR option). All flows verified: default language is German on fresh localStorage, brand is 'Gastromek CRM' everywhere (no 'ArıCRM' UI text), language switcher works and persists across navigation + reload (localStorage key 'gastromek_lang'), all pages render in BOTH languages with NO raw translation keys, PDF preview heading is 'ANGEBOT' (DE) / 'TEKLİF' (TR) with localized download button and filename, and no runtime/console errors observed.

issues: 'Geçerlilik Tarihi' / 'Gültig bis' uses native <input type=date> showing mm/dd/yyyy regardless of selected language - pre-existing design issue from iteration 1, not a regression of i18n change.

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.jsx correctly defaults to 'de' and persists to localStorage('gastromek_lang'); good fallback chain in t() (current lang -> DEFAULT_LANG -> key string).
Pre-login probe to /api/auth/me returns 401 and surfaces 2 console errors - harmless but consider suppressing the network log on the public /login route for cleaner DX.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login DE default, login, all 10+ pages in DE & TR, switcher persistence, quote view DE/TR, PDF download DE/TR, new quote form DE/TR)

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n is solid - DE is default, TR is opt-in, switcher in Sidebar (data-testid=language-switcher-btn, options language-option-de / language-option-tr). Persistence key: localStorage 'gastromek_lang'. PDFs localize via t('pdf.*') with filename prefix Angebot-/Teklif-. No raw translation keys leak in any tested page. Use Playwright regex `\b(common|status|pdf|sidebar|login|dashboard|customer|product|quote|quoteForm|customerForm|productForm|settings|users|view)\.[a-zA-Z]+` to re-scan after future edits.
rca of the issue: N/A - no functional bugs found in this iteration.
